title: Nostalgia Lobby Server
description: Optimized server mod pack for the lobby
body:
This modpack build is designed to create a comfortable and functional lobby server in Minecraft version 1.20.1. It includes a variety of modifications that improve performance, add new commands and functions, and provide convenience for players. 

Below is a list of mods with a brief description of their purpose:
- Essential Commands - Admin Utils
- Fabric Tailor - Skin system
- Fastload - Optimization
- Ferritecore - Optimization
- Debugify - Bug fixes
- Fsit - Sit mod
- Icterine- Inventory optimization
- Krypton - Optimization
- Lazydfu - Optimization
- Lithium - Optimization
- LuckPerms - Permission system
- Memory Leak Fix
- Modernfix - Bug fixes
- No Chat Reports
- Placeholder API
- Servercore - Optimization
- Slumber - This mod allows you to freeze your server when no players are online.
- Spark - Profiler
- Styled Chat - Chat colors and other stuff
- Styled Player List - Beatiful Styled Player List
- Thread Tweak
- ViaFabric - Allows connection from multiple versions
- Fabric API - Library
- Carpet - Library
- Fabric Language Kotlin - Library
- Disable end
- oωo lib -  Library
